zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Momfort Paige於1531年7月8日出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，她的父親John Page21歲，母親Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandler19歲。她於1546年7月19日與Thomas Chandler III在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伯頓 拉梅結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年3月11日享年74歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Momfort Paige于1531年7月8日出生在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德时，她的父亲John Page21岁，母亲Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandler19岁。她于1546年7月19日与Thomas Chandler III在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾伯頓 拉梅结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1606年3月11日享年74岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Paige
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Page
meanings: English and French: occupational or status name for a young servant, Middle English page, paige, Old French page (from Italian paggio, ultimately from Greek paidion, a diminutive of pais ‘boy, child’). The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lepage .
French Canadian (Pagé): altered form of French Paget , a diminutive of 1. Compare Pashia .
North German: metonymic occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle Low German page ‘horse’.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

nameMeanings.name: Momfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun, on the model of   Charity  ,   Faith  ,   Mercy  , etc. After a period of popularity following the Reformation, the name continued in infrequent use into the 19th century and recently enjoyed something of a revival, as a girl's name.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Momfort Paige was born on 8 July 1531, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, her father, John Page, was 21 and her mother, Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandler, was 19. She married Thomas Chandler III on 19 July 1546, in Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 11 March 1606, at the age of 74, and was buried in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Momfort Paige est née le 8 juillet 1531, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Page, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandler, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Chandler III le 19 juillet 1546, à Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1606, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

Lei sposato Thomas Chandler III il 19 luglio 1546, nel Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joane Momfort Paigeが1531年7月8日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた時，父John Pageは21歳，母Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandlerは19歳であった。1546年7月19日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブルトン ラティマーでThomas Chandler IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1606年3月11日に74歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Momfort Paige(이)가 1531년 7월 8일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Page(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandler(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1546년 7월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 버턴 레이팀어에서 Thomas Chandler III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 3월 11일 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Chandler III em 19 de julho de 1546, em Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Momfort Paige родилась 8 июля 1531 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Page было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandler, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Chandler III 19 июля 1546 г. в местности буртон латимир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 11 марта 1606 г. в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Momfort Paige nació el 8 de julio de 1531, en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Page, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Agnes Tate Baroness of Chandler, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomas Chandler III el 19 de julio de 1546, en Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1606, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
